categoryAliasesHint: Identifiers used during statement imports. Add multiple names so different PDF descriptions map to this category (e.g. 'Grocery' and 'Supermarket' → category 'Supermarket').
aliasChangeWarning: Warning: changing the Internal Names may cause issues with future statement imports, as the system may not recognize this category. Only change them if you know what you are doing.
statementImportHint: Supported formats: PDF (Sicredi statements), OFX and CNAB240 (Segment E). PDF statements from other banks may not work correctly.
dragDropFile: Drag & drop the file here, or click to select

noTransactionsInPdf: No transactions found in the statement.
reviewHint: Review the transactions below, select a category for each one, and click Import.
missingCategoryForRows: Please select a category for all checked transactions.
conflictResolutionInfo: The descriptions below are linked to multiple categories. The system automatically selected the first suggestion. Confirm the selection or choose another category before proceeding.
conflictPendingRows: Multiple Categories are configured with this Description as an internal name, a conflict resolution window will open when you try to continue.
propagateCategoryConfirm: More items with the same Description were found, do you want to copy this Category to all of them?
propagateLocaleConfirm: More items with the same Description were found, do you want to copy this Location to all of them?
shouldImportHint: Toggle on to include this transaction in the import. Toggle off to skip it.
reportsIntro: Generate a financial report for the selected period, with a summary (income, expenses, balance and category totals) and a detailed transaction listing.
reportError: Error generating the report. Please try again.

finnyTip_NO_DATA: Log your income and expenses to get tips tailored to your financial profile!
finnyTip_OVERSPENDING: Watch out! Your expenses are {pct}% above your income this period. How about reviewing where you can cut back?
finnyTip_SAVINGS_RATE_LOW: You're saving only {pct}% of your income. Try to gradually increase to at least 20%!
finnyTip_SAVINGS_RATE_MEDIUM: You're saving {pct}% of your income. Good progress! Try to reach 20% for greater security.
finnyTip_SAVINGS_RATE_GOOD: Great job! You're saving {pct}% of your income this period. Keep it up!
finnyTip_TOP_CATEGORY: Your biggest spending category is "{category}" ({pct}% of expenses). Worth checking if there's room to cut back!
finnyTip_BALANCE_DROP: Your net worth dropped {pct}% in the last period. How about reviewing your expenses?
finnyTip_EMERGENCY_FUND_LOW: Your emergency fund covers about {months} months of expenses. The ideal is 3 to 6 months - how about building it up little by little?
finnyTip_EMERGENCY_FUND_READY: Your reserve already covers {months} months of expenses - excellent! The surplus could earn more: it's worth studying fixed-income options. (Educational content, not investment advice.)
finnyTip_GOAL_EXPENSE_90: Watch out! You've used {pct}% of your spending limit for "{name}". Be careful with new expenses!
finnyTip_GOAL_EXPENSE_70: You're at {pct}% of your spending limit for "{name}". Keep an eye on it!
finnyTip_GOAL_SAVINGS_75: Almost there! You've reached {pct}% of your "{name}" goal. Keep going!
finnyTip_GOAL_SAVINGS_50: Halfway there! You've reached {pct}% of your "{name}" goal.
finnyTip_GOAL_DEADLINE: Your goal "{name}" expires in {days} days. Don't give up!
finnyHistoryEmpty: No tips yet. Keep using the app and Finny will get to know you better!
finnyNoActiveTips: No new tips right now. Finny will let you know when there are! 🐷
errorLinkingGoogle: Error linking Google account. Please try again.
googleLinkError: Could not link Google account. It may already be in use by another user.
errorUnlinkingGoogle: Error unlinking Google account. Please try again.
verificationEmailSent: Verification email resent! Please check your inbox.
errorResendVerification: Error resending the email. Please try again.
feedbackSubtitle: Your opinion helps us continuously improve Finance Control.
feedbackMessagePlaceholder: Describe your suggestion, issue, or comment...
feedbackNpsLabel: From 0 to 10, how likely are you to recommend Finance Control to a friend?
feedbackSuccess: Feedback submitted successfully! Thank you for your contribution.
feedbackError: Error submitting feedback. Please try again.
feedbackMinLength: Message must be at least 10 characters long.
tour_home: This is your Home screen! Here you see your balance and latest transactions at a glance - your day-to-day starting point.
tour_dashboard: On the Dashboard I show you charts of your month: what came in, what went out, and where you spend the most. Great for the big picture!
tour_budget: In Budget you set how much you want to spend per category each month, and I help you keep track so you don't overspend.
tour_goals: In Goals you create targets, like saving for a trip or capping a type of expense. I'll let you know as you get close to each one!
tour_finny: And that's me, Finny! This is where my personalized tips and your messages live. Whenever you need me, just call. 🐷
tour_txAccount: Now the most important part: recording a transaction! Start by choosing the account the money came from or went to.
tour_txCategory: Then pick the category, so you know what you're spending on (food, transport, etc.).
tour_txType: Here you say whether it's an Expense (money going out) or Income (money coming in).
tour_txValue: Enter the transaction amount. The date is already set to today, but you can change it.
tour_txSave: Done! Just click Save and your transaction is recorded. That simple. Shall we begin? 🐷
onboardingStep1Text: I'll help you take care of your money the simple way. I've already set up some categories and a "Wallet" account so you can start right now.
onboardingStep2Title: Record what comes in and goes out
onboardingStep2Text: Just click "New Transaction", pick Income (money coming in) or Expense (money going out), enter the amount and save. That simple!
onboardingStep3Text: On the Dashboard you'll see charts of your month. And I'll pop up now and then with personalized tips to help you grow. Shall we start?
tipTotalIncome: Everything that came in (income) during the selected period.
tipTotalExpenses: Everything that went out (expenses) during the selected period.
tipNetResult: Income minus expenses. Positive means you saved money; negative means you spent more than you earned.
tipAccountBalance: The sum of the current balance of all your accounts.
tipFilteredValue: The sum of the transactions that match the applied filter.
tipGoalType: Choose what to track: a spending limit, an amount to save, or income to reach.
goalTypeHintExpenseLimit: Set a spending ceiling you don't want to exceed (e.g. up to $800 on Leisure this month).
goalTypeHintSavings: Set an amount you want to save over time (e.g. $5,000 for a trip).
goalTypeHintIncome: Set an income amount you want to reach in the period (e.g. $3,000 of extra income).
budgetHint: Set how much you plan to spend each month in each category, and track below how much you've spent this month.
budgetEmpty: You haven't set any budget yet.
budgetInvalidLimit: Enter a limit greater than zero.
errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
adminFeedbacksDesc: View and filter the feedback sent by users.
adminEmailTestDesc: Send a test email to your own address.
adminFinnyTestsDesc: Trigger the welcome tour or a tip to test them.
